case_studies.challenge: Completely new project, started from 0. Needed to grow traffic rapidly.
strategy: Selected 5 Long-Tail keywords in TOP 10
All were Buyer Intent keywords (users make purchase/call after searching)
Pages with higher CTR were identified - meta tags working well
4 keywords belonged to main page, 1 to product page
Keywords 1 & 2 used in meta title; keywords 3 & 1 in meta description
Entire H1 dedicated to keyword 1; keywords 2 & 4 distributed to H2s
All 4 keywords used in content and Q&A with max 1.5% frequency
Wrote 2 blogs on keywords 3 & 4, linked back to main page
Created quality backlinks using keywords 3 & 4 as anchors
For second page: distributed power from main page, added redirect, made 1 strong backlink

results.keyword_position: #1 position for the single keyword on product page

case_studies.title_en: How We Doubled Traffic in 3 Months
case_studies.challenge: Website did not occupy leading positions. Competitors showed better results. No keyword research or keyword mapping had been done.
strategy: Detailed keyword research - divided into segments: commercial, transactional, informational
Keyword mapping - connected each keyword to specific page considering user intent
Transactional keywords to product pages, commercial to category pages, informational to blogs
Full On-Page SEO: meta tags, internal links, headlines, content optimization
Quality and thematically relevant backlinks from authoritative sources
Prioritized directions important for the business

case_studies.challenge: Construction website needing organic traffic growth. Average sales volume $30,000.
strategy: Keyword research with business representatives for relevance and prioritization
Selected keywords in top 10 not yet at #1 - saw potential for rapid growth
8 pages selected at initial stage
Keyword mapping to those pages
On-page optimization and content filling
Blogs on relevant topics with internal links
Improved navigation, prioritized selected pages
Link building: branded anchors for main page, links for selected pages

results.note: Growth achieved despite sharp seasonal decrease in August

case_studies.title_en: How Did We Increase Traffic by 270% and Sales by 45%?
case_studies.client_name: Not disclosed (tech startup in US market)
case_studies.challenge: Tech startup operating in US market on Shopify, competing with Apple and Sony. Had done some SEO but results were far from optimal. Technical problems: duplicate content, incorrect indexing, chaotic meta data, poorly structured blogs. ~90 blog articles, 30-40 of them duplicate/insufficiently optimized.
strategy: Fixed technical SEO on Shopify platform
Resolved duplicate content and incorrect indexing
Reorganized chaotically set meta data
In-depth keyword analysis - studied competitors
Keyword mapping to specific pages
Eliminated duplicate content from ~90 blog articles
Rewrote each existing blog/article, adapting for SEO
Created new content focused on correctly selected keywords
Wrote meta titles and descriptions for every existing and new blog
Thorough on-page optimization

results.additional: Achieved positions on keywords nobody dared to think about initially

case_studies.title_en: How We Increased Calls by 60% in Just 2 Months - Thanks to Local SEO
case_studies.client_name: Not disclosed (one of the most well-known Georgian brands)
case_studies.challenge: Despite being a well-known brand, practically invisible online. Website only got visitors when customers searched by exact company name. No positions on general service terms. Google My Business profile was minimal - description overly general, categories didn't reflect services. Website had technical issues and content problems, no blog strategy, no external authority.
strategy: Google My Business optimization first (fastest way to increase calls)
Refined GMB profile - categorized services, filled every field, updated descriptions
Added high-quality photos to GMB
Attracted real customer positive reviews
Fixed meta titles and descriptions with appropriate keywords
Added content to service pages
Built service structure from scratch - each service got separate optimized page
Detailed keyword research and content strategy
Internal linking system
Blog given new strategic function - FAQ-style articles, internal links to service pages
Focus on right traffic - users who actually needed the services

results.additional_calls: Up to 1,500 additional calls through Google profile
results.potential: Still has potential to triple traffic

case_studies.challenge: Medical sector with growing digital competition. Simply having a website is not enough. Needed right SEO strategy for visibility and trust.
strategy: Joined project ~1.5 months before website launch
Prepared technical SEO foundation during development phase
Planned site structure and content strategy pre-launch
Optimized JavaScript-based pages
Identified key search terms, analyzed correspondence with pages
Created topical authority map matching user intent and search engine requirements
Used old authoritative domain with existing backlinks and trust
Implemented redirect framework preserving SEO value from old URLs
Content strategy based on search intent - each article answers specific user questions
Professional medical writer created SEO-optimized content
Position monitoring from launch, strengthened fast-responding pages
Continuous content updates, internal link optimization, new topics

results.note: Growth trend is constant, not one-time success

case_studies.title_en: From SEO Crisis to Google's Top 3 Positions - In Just 2 Months
case_studies.client_name: Not disclosed (B2B company in workplace safety sector)
case_studies.challenge: Business almost entirely relies on Google for leads. Page had been penalized by Google due to old technical error. Service page not appearing for main lead-generating keyword. Only a less relevant blog post was appearing on third page. Facebook/other platform advertising doesn't work for this niche.
strategy: Detailed SEO audit to identify why page wasn't appearing
Discovered Google penalty from old technical error
Changed URL structure to align with target keyword theme
Updated meta titles and meta descriptions
Implemented 301 redirect from old blog post to service page (redistributing content authority)
Internal link building strategy from thematically related articles to service page
Added one high-quality backlink from thematically relevant and trusted source
Page returned to search results at position 10 within days
Continued adding backlinks, improving internal structure, enriching content

results.primary_metric: Top 3 position for main lead-generating keyword
results.starting_position: Not in search results (penalized) / blog on page 3
results.next_goal: First position for highest commercial potential keyword

case_studies.title_en: #1 Position in Google: 1.6K Visitors and 600% Growth in 6 Months
case_studies.title_ge: #1 პოზიცია Google-ში: 1.6K ვიზიტორი და 600%-იანი ზრდა 6 თვეში
case_studies.challenge: Clinic had website for a long time but visibility was practically zero. Business was losing potential patients who were searching for services digitally. Old methods of patient acquisition (strategic location, walk-ins) no longer sufficient.
strategy: Strategy tailored to business needs - focused on highest revenue service (implantation)
Built strategy around capturing first positions for implantation-related keywords
Structural optimization: added individual pages for every service direction
Local SEO (GMB): added strategic keywords to Google Business Profile title
Conversion optimization: embedded strategic CTA buttons, implemented results control system
Goal: every site visit reflected in real calls

results.28_day_growth: From 848 to 1,620 clicks (~100% growth in last month)
results.future_plans: Triple results, expand to medical tourism with English SEO

case_studies.note: This case study is only available in Georgian on the English URL
